title: perezia macrocephala
intro: Perezia macrocephala, also known as Perezia, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to the Andean region. This plant has been used traditionally in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Perezia macrocephala include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and alleviating symptoms of conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Perezia macrocephala can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
